caption: Job Action
description: The action that will be performed by the job when certain conditions are met.
name: job_action

type.description: The job action type, normalized to the caption of the type_id value. In the case of 'Other', it is defined by the event source.

1.caption: COM Handler
1.description: The action fires a COM handler. When this type is used, com_class_uuid and file attributes may be populated.

2.caption: Execute
2.description: The action executes a command-line operation. When this type is used, cmd_line and file attributes may be populated.

4.caption: Show Message
4.description: The action shows a message box with specified message and title.

99.caption: Other
99.description: The performed action is not mapped. See the type attribute, which contains a data source specific value.

cmd_line.description:
When type_id is Execute (2), this describes the command line that is executed.

When type_id is COM Handler (1), this may describe the DLL path stored in the COM component's InprocServer32 key or the command line stored in the COM component's LocalServer32 key.

com_class_uuid.description: When type_id is COM Handler (1), this describes the COM Class Identifier (CLSID).

file.description: When known, describes the image file that is executed when type_id is COM Handler or Execute. Note that this attribute is intended to supplement the com_class_uid or cmd_line attributes, and is not an alternative to them.

properties.description:
The list of properties associated with the performed action.
Can be populated with additional attributes of a program execution process, COM object attributes, fields of a message box or an email.

working_directory.description: When type_id is Execute (2), this describes the working directory of a program that is run by the job.
